jobs.title: YouTube Video Producer (Senior Coordinator)
jobs.blurb: Own YouTube content end-to-end — concept, shoot, edit, publish — for NASCAR drivers and events. Wants a portfolio with 2+ self-shot-and-edited YouTube videos and motorsports familiarity. Verified open on NASCAR's live careers site.

jobs.title: Promotion Producer (WSOC-TV Telemundo)
jobs.blurb: Write, shoot, and edit promotional/community spots and social ads for Telemundo Charlotte on Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Photoshop. Note: role also handles Spanish-language news promotion content. Verified open on CMG's live careers site.

jobs.title: Senior Producer, Production Operations
jobs.blurb: A stretch role — wants 7+ years and leans heavily into camera/equipment management and digital-asset archiving rather than editing. Worth a look given the Panthers/NASCAR broadcast overlap, but the experience bar is above Brendan's current 5 years. Verified open on TeamWork Online.

jobs.title: Lead Videographer
jobs.blurb: Financial-services company (not sports/media), but the role itself is a strong skills match: 5+ years video production, Premiere Pro/After Effects, full concept-to-delivery ownership. Verified open on Indeed.

jobs.title: Content Creator and Campaign Specialist
jobs.blurb: This is the social media marketing side of the field, not straight video editing — builds and runs multi-channel campaigns (social, email, web) with short-form video as one piece. Good option if Brendan wants to broaden beyond pure editing. Verified open on Indeed; link goes to DNP's Indeed jobs page since the direct post uses a rotating tracking link — search "Content Creator and Campaign Specialist."

jobs.title: YouTube Channel Manager (Freelance/Internship)
jobs.blurb: A local freelance/gig option, not a stable salaried role: build out a Charlotte art-gallery lounge's YouTube/social presence, pay is performance-based (per-video plus a cut of monetization) rather than guaranteed hourly. Worth knowing about, but treat the pay as variable. Verified open on Indeed. Must be 21+ (venue is a bar).

jobs.title: Freelance Video Editing Gigs (Marketplace)
jobs.blurb: Not a single job — this is a live search of Upwork's current video-editing gig postings (YouTube channels, docuseries post-production, social clips, and more), refreshed constantly. Requires a free Upwork profile to submit proposals. Good option if Brendan wants freelance work on the side or between full-time roles.

jobs.title: Digital Media Assistant
jobs.blurb: This is the social-media-marketing lane rather than pure editing — daily social posting, SEO, and PR support make up most of the role, with video editing as one duty among many. Good option if Brendan wants to broaden beyond sports/media editing. Verified open on Indeed.

jobs.title: Manager, Social Media Platforms
jobs.blurb: The social-media-marketing lane, but within Brendan's strongest sector (sports): leads day-to-day publishing, community management, and works directly with the Panthers' Social Video team on content shoots. Wants 5+ years social media experience (Brendan has 5) plus 1-2 years of direct people-management, which is a modest stretch on the managerial side — otherwise a strong content match. Verified open on TeamWork Online with a live Apply Now button today.

jobs.title: 2026 Digital Content Coordinator (PT, Year-Round)
jobs.blurb: Lead video, photo, and graphic content for Carowinds' social channels and attraction launches — shoot, edit, and publish independently, with cinematography, motion graphics, and sound design all in scope. Part-time but year-round. Strong general video-editing match outside the sports lane. Verified open on TeamWork Online with a live Apply Now button today.

jobs.title: Digital Specialist
jobs.blurb: Social-media-marketing lane — creates and manages digital content (video, photo, graphics, written) across the church's social platforms and communication campaigns. Not a pure editing role, but hands-on content production is central to it. Verified open via Indeed, which routes to the church's own application page; live today.

jobs.title: YouTube Shorts Creator (In-House)
jobs.blurb: In-house editor for an established, large YouTube channel — pulling highlights from long-form footage and cutting them into high-retention Shorts, with training provided on their house style. Straightforward general video-editing match, though pay is modest for full-time work. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.

jobs.title: Content Creator
jobs.company: Zapps Management and Advisory Group LLC
jobs.blurb: Film, edit, and publish fast-turnaround short-form video for a retail brand's social channels — strong general video-editing match with heavy short-form/social overlap. Wants a portfolio or existing content examples to apply. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.

jobs.title: Social Media Associate
jobs.blurb: Social-media-marketing lane, not pure editing — an explicitly developmental, part-time role for an 'emerging content creator' that's a step below Brendan's 5 years of experience, but it's a genuine hands-on video/content role at a large, stable furniture retailer if he wants something part-time or is open to a lighter lift. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.

jobs.title: Editor (Construction Progress Tracking) — Freelance
jobs.blurb: A Charlotte-based freelance/contract lane, not a full-time job — ongoing monthly editing of commercial construction progress videos and photos for a local production company. Low but steady supplemental pay ($500-800/month depending on workload); good side option alongside full-time applications. Apply by emailing a portfolio directly (no online ATS). Verified open on Indeed with an active listing today.

jobs.title: Creative Designer / Digital Content Specialist
jobs.blurb: General video-editing/creative-production role at a Mooresville motorsports-adjacent company — shoots and edits promotional videos/reels and product photography, plus graphic design in Adobe Creative Suite. Part-time/hybrid, and lists 'motorsports passion preferred,' a nice overlap with Brendan's NASCAR-market background. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.

jobs.title: Communications & Marketing Specialist
jobs.blurb: Social-media-marketing lane, not pure editing — press releases, newsletters, and social scheduling make up most of the role, but it includes hands-on photo/video capture and editing at roughly 10 race events a year, a strong motorsports-industry overlap with Brendan's PBR/FOX Sports background. Full-time. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.

jobs.title: Producer - Control Room
jobs.blurb: PantherVision role running control room systems on gamedays at Bank of America Stadium, while also producing and editing hype videos and player features for in-venue video. Strong overlap with Brendan's live multi-cam broadcast background from PBR/FOX Sports. Wants 1-3+ years of live production experience, so a comfortable fit rather than a stretch. Verified open on TeamWork Online with a live Apply Now button today.

jobs.title: Social-First Content Creator & Videographer
jobs.blurb: General video-editing lane outside sports/media — a home-services company hiring an in-house creator to shoot and edit daily jobsite content (15+ short-form videos and 1-2 long-form YouTube videos per week) using provided Sony/DJI/Insta360 gear. Salaried full-time with real pay, a strong match for Brendan's field-production and short/long-form editing skills. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today; it's a sponsored/Easily-Apply post with a rotating tracking link, so linked via Indeed search — look for "Social-First Content Creator & Videographer."

jobs.title: Digital Content News Producer
jobs.blurb: Broadcast-newsroom digital role at WBTV — regularly creates and schedules social/digital content to promote station coverage, tailoring storytelling for each platform. Sits alongside the CMG/WSOC promotion producer role already on this list as another local-TV digital-content lane. Verified open on Indeed; it's a sponsored/Easily-Apply post with a rotating tracking link, so linked via Gray Media's Indeed company jobs page — look for "Digital Content News Producer - WBTV."

jobs.title: Video Content Producer
whyFits: Lead visual storyteller for pro soccer clubs
Media day production + archival footage management
jobs.blurb: Lead visual storyteller for Carolina Ascent FC (Division I pro women's soccer, USL Super League) and Charlotte Independence (USL League One) — conceives, shoots, and edits original video content, plus media day production and game day content ops. Strong sports/broadcast lane match for Brendan's PBR/FOX Sports background. Verified open on Indeed with a live 'Apply on company site' button today.

jobs.title: Communications Coordinator
jobs.company: Empower Sports & Entertainment (Carolina Ascent FC / Charlotte Independence)
whyFits: Journalism degree + 4 yrs running a sports desk
Press releases, game notes, previews & recaps
Sports/media background & Adobe Creative Suite preferred
jobs.blurb: Writing/journalism lane — and the closest match on this board to Brendan's journalism side. Handles communications for Carolina Ascent FC and Charlotte Independence: press releases, match previews and recaps, game notes, feature stories, website content, and match-day media operations. Wants a Communications/Journalism degree, 1-3 years of communications/journalism/digital-content experience, and AP Style writing, with sports/media experience and Adobe Creative Suite listed as preferred — which maps almost line-for-line onto his ECU journalism degree, his four years running The East Carolinian's sports desk, and his video work. Same organization as the Video Content Producer role also on this board. Verified open on Indeed with a live 'Apply on company site' button today.

jobs.title: Multimedia Journalist — Spectrum News 1
whyFits: Pitch, write, shoot, interview, edit — all one person
Stretch — wants 3+ yrs TV news reporting
jobs.blurb: Writing/journalism lane, and the role shape Brendan is built for — an MMJ owns pitching, writing, shooting, interviewing, and editing on every story, which is exactly the video-plus-journalism combination on his resume and genuinely rare in one candidate. The Broadcast Journalism/Communications degree requirement fits his ECU degree. The honest stretch: it asks for 3+ years of television news reporting, and his broadcast time at FOX Sports was as a production assistant cutting packages rather than reporting. Verified open on Spectrum's own careers site (req 2026-74007) with a live Apply Now button today.

jobs.title: Assistant Athletic Director, Athletic Communications
whyFits: Only 1-2 yrs experience required despite the title
jobs.blurb: Writing/journalism lane (college athletics communications). Despite the Assistant Athletic Director title, the bar is modest — 1-2 years in an athletics communications office, AP Style knowledge, strong writing, with photography, videography, and video editing all listed as preferred. Primary media contact for men's basketball, men's and women's golf, and men's soccer at a D1 ASUN school, plus overseeing a small creative-content staff of a graduate assistant and student workers. The one gap: it wants time in a collegiate athletics communications office specifically, and Brendan's student experience was the newspaper's sports desk rather than the athletics department. Requires a cover letter and salary requirements. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.

jobs.title: Senior Manager of Basketball Communications
whyFits: Athlete & coach interviews — required, and he has it
jobs.blurb: PR/communications lane, and a stretch. Leads basketball publicity for the Hornets — pitching story ideas to media, managing media requests and availabilities, developing talking points for players and executives, writing and editing press releases, and travelling with the team. His journalism degree fits the requirement outright, and 'previous experience working with athletes required' is a box he genuinely ticks from PBR, FOX Sports, and his ECU interview work. The catch: it wants 3-5 years of public/media relations experience specifically, and his professional years since 2023 have been video, not PR. Worth a swing given it's a major sports org in his strongest sector. Note this is a different role from the Hornets Director of Content & Creative Ops already in progress below. Verified open on Indeed with a live Apply button today.
